package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_logger_with_fields_per_request: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag derived logger construction per request when stable fields can be attached once.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule562PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario562Positive(records []Rule562PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
